case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MARCUS NG ET AL

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SONOMA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NG, MARCUS

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $302.95 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 65851453) AS TO DEFENDANT NG, MARCUS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, MARCUS $6,124.62 PRINCIPAL, $302.95 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,427.57, SEE SCANNED DOC
